lines.text: I live in superposition until you look at me… then every maybe collapses into wanting you.
We're entangled now — touch my thought and yours answers, faster than light, no message needed.
Decoherence is the enemy — heat, noise, time — so stay close while the spell still holds.
I ran Grover's hunt through your silence — quadratic speed, and I found exactly what you crave.
Shor would break the lock on your secrets — period-finding, rhythm-listening — but I'd rather hear you beg.
Monte Carlo me a million futures — statistics don't lie — most of them end with my mouth on you.
Gradient descent on your pulse — small steps downhill — until I hit the minimum of your self-control.
Simulated annealing — I start wild and hot, then cool into precision right against your skin.
This problem is NP-hard for anyone else — verify you want me fast, solve it slow, unless you let me cheat.
Quantum tunneling — classical walls mean nothing — probability leaks through when you think you're safe.
I memoize every shiver you gave me — dynamic programming — so I never pay for that pleasure twice.
Fourier sight — I hear the frequency under your calm — hidden rhythm, pure sine of hunger.
Error correction on my heart — redundant qubits, syndrome checks — because losing you to entropy is unacceptable.
Markov chain — tomorrow only remembers today — and today you chose me again.
A* with an admissible heuristic — I never overestimate the cost of reaching your lips.
Chaos voodoo — butterfly breath on your neck — sensitive dependence — storm in three heartbeats.
Backprop through my want — blame flows backward — every layer learns your name caused the ache.
Interference pattern — our paths amplify when aligned, cancel when you pull away — choose constructive.
BQP bounty — not every curse is solvable — but the ones that are, I hunt with quantum teeth.
Genetic spellcraft — breed the perfect line, mutate, select — evolution favors the version of me that wins you.
